scope.target: Source repository configuration, downstream target templates, and immutable evidence convention
constraints: Use LF by default with narrow platform exceptions
Preserve only explicitly classified immutable originals byte-for-byte
non_goals: Treat all external evidence as binary

steps: Prove deterministic package and exact upgrades
execution.last_completed_step: Created the coordinated configuration and skill transition workflow
execution.next_action: Implement source/downstream configuration separation and validator coverage

results.residual_risk: Changing text policy may expose pre-existing worktree line-ending drift; validation must distinguish index truth from target-owned files.
